actions.message: Locked — security wing. Find the red keycard.
Hold the lab floor, then take the elevator down.
The elevator's dead — restore power in the security wing.

stages.message: IT FOLLOWED US UP FROM HELL.
LAST PUSH — THEN DOWN TO THE REACTOR.

keyLocks.speaker: Aspen
keyLocks.armText: There — a red keycard on that bench. It opens the security wing.
keyLocks.unlockText: Card read — security wing's open. Grab what's inside.

actions.message: The reactor core — and whatever John left guarding it.

stages.message: THE CORE IS GUARDED — PUSH THROUGH.
CLEAR THE FLOOR — THEN THE BIG ONE.
